summary: Iteration 110: Automation System Improvements - All 6 workstreams tested and verified. 14/14 backend tests passed. WS1 (Prisma singleton) verified via code review. WS2 (Unsubscribe endpoint) fully tested with all edge cases. WS3 (Inquiry acknowledgement) already exists via sendClientConfirmation. WS4 (Post-call quote reminder) endpoint tested. WS5 (Auto-stop onboarding on LOST) tested via both PATCH endpoints. WS6 (Multi-tier stale nudges) verified via scheduler code review.
critical_code_review_comments: WS1: Prisma singleton correctly implemented in /app/kolor-studio-v2/backend/src/lib/prisma.ts - all services import from this singleton
WS2: Unsubscribe route at /api/unsubscribe/:token correctly searches 3 enrollment tables (SequenceEnrollment, QuoteFollowUpEnrollment, ClientOnboardingEnrollment)
WS3: Inquiry acknowledgement already implemented via sendClientConfirmation in leads.ts submit endpoint
WS4: Discovery-call endpoint correctly schedules POST_CALL_QUOTE_REMINDER 24h after discoveryCallCompletedAt
WS5: Both PATCH /api/leads/:id and PATCH /api/leads/:id/status correctly call stopOnboardingForLead when status=LOST
WS6: Scheduler has Tier 1 (7-day) and Tier 2 (14-day) stale lead nudges with proper date range filtering
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test leads during testing (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 110 tested all 6 automation workstreams. Key endpoints: GET /api/unsubscribe/:token (public, returns HTML), PATCH /api/leads/:id/discovery-call (schedules POST_CALL_QUOTE_REMINDER), PATCH /api/leads/:id/status and PATCH /api/leads/:id (both call stopOnboardingForLead on LOST). Prisma singleton at /app/kolor-studio-v2/backend/src/lib/prisma.ts. Scheduler at /app/kolor-studio-v2/backend/src/scheduler.ts has Tier 1 (7-day) and Tier 2 (14-day) stale lead nudges.

WS1_prisma_singleton: scheduledEmailService.ts imports from singleton (no new PrismaClient())
WS2_unsubscribe_endpoint: GET /api/unsubscribe/:token returns 400 with 'Invalid Link' for short tokens (<10 chars)
GET /api/unsubscribe/:token returns 200 with 'Already Unsubscribed' for non-existent valid-length tokens
Endpoint searches SequenceEnrollment, QuoteFollowUpEnrollment, ClientOnboardingEnrollment tables
Endpoint is public (no auth required) for CAN-SPAM compliance
WS3_inquiry_acknowledgement: sendClientConfirmation already called in POST /api/leads/submit endpoint
Inquiry acknowledgement email sent to client on form submission
WS4_post_call_quote_reminder: POST_CALL_QUOTE_REMINDER scheduled 24h after discovery call completion
WS5_auto_stop_onboarding_lost: PATCH /api/leads/:id with status=LOST also calls stopOnboardingForLead('lead_lost')
stopOnboardingForLead function in onboardingService.ts stops active enrollments
lostAt timestamp set when status changes to LOST
WS6_multi_tier_stale_nudges: Scheduler has Tier 1 (7-day) stale lead check
Scheduler has Tier 2 (14-day) stale lead check with more urgent tone
Both tiers respect user's staleLeadEmailEnabled preference
Leads with status BOOKED or LOST are excluded from nudges
